summary: UI bug fixes in Rough Estimate dialog verified. All 3 bugs FIXED: 1) UnitSelect dropdown now opens properly (z-index fix), 2) Qty field accepts decimal values like 10.5, 3) Dropdowns are NOT clipped by dialog boundary (overflow:visible + inner scroll wrapper).

test_credentials.how_to_login: Click Demo Access tab, select Planning role, click Login button

seed_data_creation: Used existing RE projects (RE - Harini). Created test scope item 'Test Flooring Work' with decimal values.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three UI bugs in REProjectsPage.jsx Rough Estimate dialog have been fixed and verified: 1) UnitSelect dropdown z-index issue fixed by moving overflow-y-auto to inner div wrapper, 2) Decimal input in Qty/Rate fields works (NumericInput component with allowDecimal=true), 3) Building Type dropdown also works without clipping. Save functionality persists decimal values correctly.

bug1_unit_select_dropdown.fix: UnitSelect now uses z-50 class and dialog has overflow:visible
bug1_unit_select_dropdown.result: PASS - Dropdown opens properly, search works, selections work
bug1_unit_select_dropdown.evidence: Screenshot 25_unit_dropdown_open.png shows dropdown visible outside dialog

bug2_decimal_qty_input.description: Quantity field did not accept decimal values like 10.5
bug2_decimal_qty_input.fix: NumericInput component with allowDecimal=true, removed parseFloat from onChange
bug2_decimal_qty_input.result: PASS - Qty field accepts 10.5, displays correctly
bug2_decimal_qty_input.evidence: Console output: Qty value: '10.5' SUCCESS: Qty field accepts decimal 10.5!

bug3_dropdown_clipped.description: Dropdown menu clipped by dialog boundary (z-index/overflow issue)
bug3_dropdown_clipped.fix: Removed overflow-y-auto from DialogContent, added inner div with max-h-[70vh] overflow-y-auto
bug3_dropdown_clipped.result: PASS - Both UnitSelect and Building Type dropdowns render outside dialog bounds
bug3_dropdown_clipped.evidence: Screenshot 26_building_dropdown_open.png shows 6 options visible without clipping

rate_decimal_input.result: PASS - Rate field accepts decimal values

dialog_scroll.description: Dialog content scrolls with inner wrapper
dialog_scroll.result: PASS - Dialog content scrollable, dropdowns not affected

REProjectsPage.jsx.line_451: Inner div with max-h-[70vh] overflow-y-auto for scrollable content
REProjectsPage.jsx.line_585-605: NumericInput for Qty and Rate fields with allowDecimal=true
REProjectsPage.jsx.line_594-599: UnitSelect component with z-50 dropdown positioning

NumericInput.jsx.line_43: allowDecimal=true by default, handles decimal point correctly

UnitSelect.jsx.line_135: Dropdown uses z-50 class for proper stacking

test_flow: 1. Login as Planning role via Demo Access
4. Click Add Item to add scope row
7. Open UnitSelect dropdown - VERIFIED NOT CLIPPED
9. Open Building Type dropdown - VERIFIED NOT CLIPPED
